footer.joinUs: Join us in shaping tomorrow with innovative design and technology.

header.title: Unleash Your Creativity with 3D Innovation
header.description: Tokspace empowers creators in Indonesia with cutting-edge 3D printing technology and modular design kits. Join our community of innovators and bring your ideas to life.

steppers.title: Discover How Local Creators Innovate with Us
steppers.subtitle: Join us on a journey through the creative process. Watch how local creators harness our technology to bring their visions to life.
steppers.step1Description: Creators brainstorm ideas and sketch their concepts, laying the groundwork for innovation.
steppers.step2Description: Using our tools, creators transform sketches into digital designs ready for 3D printing.
steppers.step3Description: Creators print prototypes, testing functionality and aesthetics to refine their products before launch.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to your questions about our products and services below.
faq.answer1: Tokspace is a creative tech company that merges design and technology. We focus on 3D-printed products and modular kits. Our mission is to empower local entrepreneurs through innovative solutions.
faq.answer2: 3D printing transforms digital designs into physical objects layer by layer. This technology allows for rapid prototyping and customization. At Tokspace, we harness this to create unique products that meet your needs.
faq.answer3: Absolutely! In the near future, we offer customization options for many of our products. You can modify designs to suit your personal style or specific requirements. Stay tuned!
faq.answer4: We use high-quality, eco-friendly materials for our 3D-printed products. Our selection includes biodegradable plastics and durable composites. This ensures both sustainability and longevity in your purchase—this includes our packaging!
faq.answer5: Placing an order is easy! Simply browse our product catalog, select your desired items, and follow the checkout process. If you have questions, our support team is here to assist you.

buyProduct.detailsText: Discover the craftsmanship behind this product. Each piece is thoughtfully designed to inspire creativity and innovation.
